evidence: The paper calculates feature importance from "node impurity, such as the Gini index...or variance explained for regression." For iRF-LOOP, "the resulting importance scores are then combined into an edge matrix" and networks are created by keeping "the top 10%, 5%, 1%, and 0.1% of edge scores." Validation occurs only through Gene Ontology overlap ("intersecting with the GO network"), but the authors never employ permutation importance, SHAP, conditional importance, or held-out validation to corroborate whether the importance rankings themselves are accurate or resistant to impurity bias.
